# Project: tg-math-games

Telegram Mini App with two hot-seat math games. Vite + React + TypeScript.

## Conventions

- Package manager: pnpm (never npm/yarn)
- Init project with `pnpm create vite` then `pnpm add`
- Never write package.json by hand
- TypeScript strict mode
- Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
- All UI text in Russian
- Mobile-first, no horizontal scroll, no vertical scroll — everything fits one screen
- Dark theme, integrate with Telegram WebApp theme via CSS variables
- Single-file components, no separate CSS files
